**Description**
A clear and concise description of what this PR changes.

**Type of change**
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

**Checklist**
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have tested my changes
- [ ] The frontend builds without errors

**Related Issue**
If applicable, reference the issue this PR addresses.
